name: Fettuccine W/Lentil Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Start with the sauce: Heat the olive oil in a large pan.
2. Saute the onion for 10 minutes.
3. Add the garlic, cinnamon, lentils, tomatoes, and water to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Simmer until the lentils are tender (about 20 minutes).
6. Cook the fettuccine according to package directions.
7. Drain the cooked pasta.
8. Add butter to the sauce.
9. Turn the sauce into individual dinner plates.
10. Top each plate with the cooked fettuccine and sauce.
11. Serve.
